title: Handle recovery completion and retry guard
description: Implement scheduler completion handling for successful recovery beads and prevent duplicate recovery/corrective creation when operators retry a no-structured-output bead that already has a pending recovery bead.
acceptance_criteria: Scheduler has a dedicated recovery-completion path that copies the recovery handoff to the original bead, marks the original bead complete, finishes the recovery bead, and resumes normal follow-up creation.
If a recovery bead itself fails or blocks, the original bead remains blocked and no recovery-of-recovery is created.
Retry handling warns and skips duplicate recovery/corrective creation when a no-structured-output bead already has a corresponding recovery bead.
Recovery beads remain visible to bead listing flows with `bead_type=recovery`.
